title: Wolf in the Pines
overview: Joe, a grizzled inner city detective, is on the trail of Katy, a young girl he rescued years ago from a harrowing ordeal. Now, she's missing again, and the case points to a sinister cult tied to her original disappearance. With time running out, Joe teams up with his sharp yet unsure new partner, Sammy, to unravel the mystery and save Katy before the cult's ominous plans reach their devastating conclusion.
